issues.title: Users cannot export reports to CSV or PDF
comments: Sales: 3 enterprise deals on hold because of this
Customer Acme Corp threatened to cancel if not fixed in Q2
This came up in 5 customer calls this month

issues.title: Bulk export for admin users
comments: Duplicate of TF-001 but for admins specifically
Enterprise tier customers keep asking

issues.title: Export scheduled reports via email
comments: Follow-up to TF-001 — users want automated exports
Would close 2 more deals according to sales

issues.title: Notification bell shows wrong unread count
comments: Reported by 14 users this week
Count resets randomly on page reload

issues.title: Too many notification emails — users unsubscribing
comments: 23% of users disabled all notifications last month
DAU dropped 8% correlated with notification changes
Users say inbox is flooded

issues.title: Notification preferences page — granular control
comments: Users want per-project notification settings
Competitors Asana and Linear both have this

issues.title: Mobile app crashes on task assignment
comments: Crash rate 12% on iOS 17.4
Sentry shows 400+ crashes per day
Hot fix being worked on

issues.title: Mobile offline mode — tasks not syncing
comments: Field teams cannot use app without internet
3 construction company clients affected
They use app on job sites with poor signal

issues.title: Mobile dark mode not working on Android
comments: Cosmetic issue — low priority
Only affects Android 12 and below

issues.title: Dashboard loads slowly for large workspaces
comments: Workspaces with 500+ tasks take 8-12 seconds to load
Enterprise client GlobalCorp complained in QBR
Losing enterprise deals because of this

issues.title: API rate limits too restrictive for enterprise
comments: Enterprise customers building integrations hitting limits
Competitor offers 10x our limits

issues.title: SSO login broken for Okta users
comments: Fixed in last sprint
Was blocking 2 enterprise onboardings

issues.title: Task dependencies — block/blocked by relationship
comments: Most requested feature in NPS survey — 340 votes
Project managers cannot plan sprints without this
Jira and Linear both have this — we dont

issues.title: Recurring tasks — daily, weekly, monthly
comments: Second most requested in NPS — 280 votes
Operations teams need this for daily standups and weekly reviews
Moved from last 3 sprints due to capacity

issues.title: Subtasks not showing in main task list view
comments: Users confused about where subtasks went
UX regression from last release

issues.title: Gantt chart view for project timeline
comments: Nice to have — low urgency
Some PMs requesting but not blocking deals

issues.title: Workspace analytics — team productivity report
comments: Managers want to see team velocity and completion rates
Mentioned in 4 enterprise sales calls

issues.title: Search is slow and misses results
comments: Search takes 3-5 seconds
Does not search inside task descriptions
Users reverting to browser Ctrl+F

issues.title: Slack integration — task updates in Slack
comments: Being built this sprint
High demand from startup customers

issues.title: Google Calendar sync broken
comments: Due dates not syncing to Google Calendar
About 200 users affected based on support tickets

issues.title: Custom fields for tasks
comments: Enterprise customers need to add their own metadata
Blocking 2 large accounts from full adoption
Notion and Airtable both have this

issues.title: Onboarding flow confusing for new users
comments: 40% of new signups drop off before creating first task
Session recordings show confusion at workspace setup
Activation rate is 32% — industry avg is 55%

issues.title: In-app tooltips and feature discovery
comments: Users not discovering key features like filters and views
Would help activation rate

issues.title: Two-factor authentication for all users
comments: Enterprise customers require this for compliance
Blocking 3 deals in financial services sector
SOC2 audit requires this

issues.title: Audit log for enterprise compliance
comments: Required for SOC2 and enterprise procurement
Same 3 financial services deals blocked
